title: flash QA reliability — post-fix failure taxonomy on a live Sweetie HD after-slice

redactionContract.policy: ZDR / no-game-bytes. This artifact carries ONLY counts, cost, the zdr flag, and MECHANICAL failure signatures normalized to remove every uuid, character offset, and game string. No source text, no draft text.

failuresBySignature.followUp: QA model emits draftSpan as a non-object shape the coercer does not cover; survives the bounded retry. Follow-up: live-capture the exact shape -> targeted coercion.

notes: All remaining failure signatures are MECHANICAL (bugs to drive to 0 per the 0%-mechanical-error standard); none are legitimate 'hard-line' content deferrals. Tracked as follow-ups in the PR body for a dedicated drive-to-0 wave.

QA-span out-of-bounds was driven from 7 processed units (pre-prompt-fix slice) to 1 (with the prompt fix) to 0 in this post-#79 run by the span-indexing prompt hardening (lever #1); the only remaining signature is the malformed-shape 'expected object' case.
The out-of-bounds hard-fail (QaSpanOutOfBoundsError) is the no-masking backstop: a QA finding pointing past the real unit text is rejected loud, never silently accepted.
